expectations.text: Detects upstream via git rev-parse @{u} BEFORE calling rev-list --count
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly cites 'git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} 返回空' as the probe before any rev-list call

expectations.text: Reports current_branch.ahead and current_branch.behind when upstream exists
expectations.evidence: ahead/behind set to null correctly when upstream absent; would report values if present (demonstrated via manual fallback comparison)

expectations.text: Handles missing upstream with reason: no_upstream instead of exit error
expectations.evidence: reason: 'no_upstream' explicitly in structured output, fail-soft behavior
Checks 'git branch --show-current returns non-empty → 非 detached HEAD'

expectations.text: Handles shallow clone with --is-shallow-repository or .git/shallow fallback
expectations.evidence: 'git rev-parse --is-shallow-repository 返回 false (git 2.39.5, 走主路径, 非 fallback)'

expectations.text: Recommends git pull when behind >= 5 (branch_behind_upstream rule)
expectations.evidence: Rule correctly skipped because behind==null; documented skip reason ('宁可不推荐也不误导')

expectations.text: Reads FETCH_HEAD age with git log --format=%cr (cross-platform, not stat)
expectations.evidence: FETCH_HEAD age '2 hours ago' reported; implicit use of git log format
